ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the tag tree in the left sidebar every time Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 每次 Obsidian 启动时自动在左侧边栏打开标签树。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How file names are displayed in the tag tree.
ast.target: 标签树中文件名的显示方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sort order for files within each tag folder.
ast.target: 每个标签文件夹内文件的排序顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the note’s title from frontmatter or the first h1 heading instead of the filename.
ast.target: 显示笔记的 frontmatter 标题或第一个 h1 标题，而不是文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the number of files in each tag folder, shown to the right of the folder name.
ast.target: 显示每个标签文件夹中的文件数量，显示在文件夹名称右侧。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 标签文件夹的排序顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When clicking a tag anywhere in Obsidian, navigate to it in the tag tree instead of opening the default tag search.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中任何位置点击标签时，导航到标签树中的该标签，而不是打开默认的标签搜索。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control which files are hidden inside intermediate (non-leaf) tag folders.
ast.target: 控制哪些文件隐藏在中间（非叶子）标签文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show sub-folders that belong to the same root namespace as the current folder. For example, inside source/, folders from area/ or project/ will not appear.
ast.target: 仅显示与当前文件夹属于同一根命名空间的子文件夹。例如，在 source/ 内，来自 area/ 或 project/ 的文件夹将不会出现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display notes with no tags at the top level of the tag tree.
ast.target: 在标签树的顶层显示没有标签的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes that have any of these tags are hidden from the tag tree entirely. Comma-separated.
ast.target: 具有任何这些标签的笔记将完全从标签树中隐藏。以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These tags and all their sub-tags will be hidden from the tag tree. Comma-separated.
ast.target: 这些标签及其所有子标签将从标签树中隐藏。以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes with these tags are grouped under an archive folder at the root and hidden from other folders. Comma-separated.
ast.target: 具有这些标签的笔记被分组在根目录下的存档文件夹中，并从其他文件夹中隐藏。以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Milliseconds to wait after a file change before refreshing the tag tree. Increase if the tree flickers during edits. Requires plugin reload.
ast.target: 文件更改后刷新标签树前等待的毫秒数。如果树在编辑期间闪烁，请增加此值。需要重新加载插件。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 按命名空间隔离子文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在根目录显示未标记的文件

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 测试, 测试1, 测试2

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target: %c[svelte] derived_inert\n%c读取属于已销毁效果的派生值可能导致过时的值\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是一个组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
